**Communication strategy:** Informal, smart, and lightly playful; create recognition around software for physical-product teams, let the graph-service story imply capability, and leave room for a conversation.

## Ranked Approach Plan

1. Email the founders together using the founder note below.
2. If there is no reply within two business days, complete the official route. Do it immediately if the posting is time-sensitive.
3. If the Opportunity is still quiet five business days after the latest Attempt, review the wait state before using the LinkedIn backup.

Hi Yonatan and Adar,

Jiga made immediate sense to me because I already work in the awkward space where physical systems and software have to agree. At Danfoss, that led me to own a graph service from messy requirements through the data model and APIs, then connect it to product surfaces people actually use.

What I like about your role is that "product engineer" seems to mean it: understand the user, choose what matters, and ship across the boundary. That is the room I want to be in next.

If the overlap sounds interesting, I would enjoy comparing notes on how your team builds for hardware companies.

## Formal Route

Complete the official application when the parallel-route window closes or immediately if timing is unsafe.
